title: Trusted Public Key Provenance Validation Report
description: Machine-readable report contract emitted by veritas-evidence-bundle validate-key-provenance --json. This schema validates the report shape only. It does not re-run cryptographic verification, create trust, prove regulatory certification, or complete third-party audit approval. The report intentionally exposes booleans and fixed diagnostics only; it does not expose raw fingerprints, raw file paths, raw exception text, raw schema validator messages, or raw JSON values.

ok.description: Overall validate-key-provenance result. True means the receipt and saved verification result schemas passed, fingerprints correlated, bundle_internal_key_used was false, and strict authenticity succeeded.

receipt_schema_valid.description: True when the Trusted Public Key Provenance Receipt conforms to its JSON Schema.

verification_result_schema_valid.description: True when the saved Evidence Bundle verification result conforms to its JSON Schema.

fingerprint_correlation_ok.description: True when both inputs contain public key fingerprint fields and those internal values match. The raw values are not emitted in this report.

bundle_internal_key_used_ok.description: True when the receipt reports bundle_internal_key_used as false.

strict_authenticity_ok.description: True when the saved verification result reports strict authenticity success.

receipt_public_key_fingerprint_present.description: True when the receipt contains a public key fingerprint field. The raw fingerprint is not emitted.

verification_result_public_key_fingerpri.description: True when the saved verification result contains a public key fingerprint field. The raw fingerprint is not emitted.

report_schema_id.description: Identifies this validation report schema. This metadata validates report shape only; it does not re-run cryptographic verification or establish trust.

receipt_schema_id.description: Identifies the Trusted Public Key Provenance Receipt schema used by validate-key-provenance.

verification_result_schema_id.description: Identifies the saved Evidence Bundle verification result schema used by validate-key-provenance.

validator.description: Identifies the validator command that emitted this report.

errors.description: Fixed public diagnostics for failed checks. Empty when ok is true.

path.description: Fixed public JSONPath-like location for the failed check.

enum: verification result does not satisfy schema
receipt and verification result public key fingerprints do not match
verification result must report strict authenticity success
message.description: Fixed public diagnostic. Raw external values and raw validator messages are not permitted.
